text.title: Laravel Queues Examples
text.summary: Worked example: SendOrderConfirmationJob with retries, backoff, idempotency, failed().

example.context: Laravel 11 + Redis queue + Horizon; Order model; mail vendor (SendGrid) with occasional 5xx.
example.walk: Step 1: artisan make:job SendOrderConfirmationJob; constructor `public function __construct(public readonly int $orderId, public readonly string $idempotencyKey)`. Step 2: `$tries = 5; $timeout = 30; public function backoff(): array { return [10, 30, 60, 120, 240]; }`. Step 3: handle() reloads Order; if `confirmation_sent_at` not null → return; else send via MailService → set confirmation_sent_at. Step 4: failed() captures to Sentry + Slack notification including order_id + last exception. Step 5: dispatch onQueue('mail'); Horizon supervisor has mail queue with 4 workers + max_jobs_per_worker=500.
example.output: Transient mail vendor 5xx auto-retried with exponential backoff + jitter; permanent failure paged operator with job context; no double-send.
